title: Icy Zanzibari Almond Pancakes
description: These nutty and flaky almond pancakes are energizing with a touch of tomato juice and grilled almonds. Perfect for a middle-eastern-inspired snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Mix flour, almond butter, milk, eggs, turmeric, salt, cumin, and tomato juice in a bowl.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle and add enough oil for cooking.
Pour batter onto heated skillet and let cook until golden brown on bottom.
Gently place grilled almonds between the pancakes as they cool slightly.
Serve with additional tomato juice and freshly chopped garlic powder.
Enjoy as an energizing snack or light meal.
